tasks.subject: Hard audit of founding spec + master plan index + Plan 01
tasks.notes: Audit ran via dispatched general-purpose agent with risk-auditor persona inlined (Path A adapted). Returned RED with 28 findings + DESIGN-RETHINK FLAG. Report at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-14_audit-report.md. Walkthrough produced amendment plan at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-14_amendments.md. Major outcome: Plan 01 splits into 01a/01b/01c.

tasks.subject: Terrain prep — git identity, accounts, age key, origin remote, context-file rewrite
tasks.notes: Pre-Batch-1 readiness session per Ricardo's pivot ('clean the terrain before pouring foundation'). Landed: prior-session audit/walkthrough commits; .gitignore + .gitattributes hygiene; contacto@nexostrat.com mailbox; nexostrat accounts on GitHub/Codeberg/Gitea (Notion via JP's personal subscription); ed25519 SSH keypair + ~/.ssh/config Host aliases for clean git ops; Ricardo's age keypair (passphrase-encrypted, Bitwarden-backed); infra/age-recipients.txt with Ricardo pubkey + JP placeholder; git remote origin -> Gitea pushed (8 commits); JP Spanish coordination Signal message sent; full Nexostrat-native rewrite of CLAUDE.md / GEMINI.md / README.md (no Brain refs); events.json -> calendar.json rename + $schema field updates. Surfaced corrections to fold into Batch 1: Gitea port :3001 not :3000, F14 Notion cost reverts to $0 to firm. Journal at 00_META/journal/2026-05-14_terrain-prep.md.

tasks.subject: Batch 1 — Apply spec + ADR + master index amendments (with terrain-prep corrections folded in)
tasks.notes: Done 2026-05-14 evening. Three commits pushed to Gitea origin: dc5cbec (Batch 1a spec single-pass amendment), 5f126a7 (Batch 1b new ADR bodies 021bis/036/037), d5ebbf9 (Batch 1c master plan index split Plan 01 -> 01a/01b/01c + SUPERSEDED banner). All 28 audit findings + 6 recommendations either landed in the spec/ADR/index layer or scheduled into 01a/01b/01c per their tags. F14-REVISED resolved to a no-op (original spec already shows Notion at $0 to firm). Working tree clean. Journal at 00_META/journal/2026-05-14_batch-1-amendments.md.

tasks.subject: Build Aurora-styled HTML presentation of the AMENDED design
tasks.notes: Done 2026-05-14 in two commits. v1 (c1b791d): single-file HTML at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-14_nexostrat-presentation.html, 8 Parts × 34 disclosure cards (ELI5/Técnico side-by-side), 5 SVG diagrams (replication topology, vault decrypt flow, 12-station pipeline, Heavy/Light side-by-side, plan roadmap), 22 ADR badges with hover/click popovers wired to a 35-entry JS dict, sticky TOC with scroll-spy, Aurora palette + Space Grotesk/Manrope/JBM via Google Fonts CDN. Sibling .tests.md documents validation harness. v2 (e6a8eca): 9 edits per Ricardo's review — no calendar dates anywhere, replication topology SVG rebuilt at 1100x720 with orthogonal lines, folder tree corrected (Skills 1/2/3/6 marked built), strict-rules rule 6 removed, costs rewritten to actual (Claude MAX × 2 from socios personal, Gemini free until ~Oct 2026, firm $0 Stage 1), roadmap diagram rebuilt at 1200x920, Card 32 Due column dropped, new Card 27a 'Qué hace el bot por nosotros' with capabilities + plugin adaptability + WhatsApp future, new featured Ollama gradient block before bot card. 218.9 KB / 3409 lines final. Validation: JS syntax ✓, 6 SVGs well-formed ✓, all anchors resolve ✓, all 25 ADR badges wired ✓. Journal at 00_META/journal/2026-05-14_aurora-html-presentation.md.

tasks.subject: Batch 2 — Write Plans 01a / 01b / 01c via writing-plans skill
tasks.notes: **NEXT SESSION ACTION** as of 2026-05-14 end. Aurora HTML presentation done (t-presentation closed). Now fully unblocked. Three sequential superpowers:writing-plans runs. 01a (~15 tasks foundation), 01b (~10 tasks mirrors+standby), 01c (~10 tasks personas+hooks+integration test). Per-plan headers already landed in 00_META/plans/README.md commit d5ebbf9 — the writing-plans skill expands those headers into full task-by-task plans. Each plan inherits its share of the 28 finding amendments per the amendment plan. Plan 01c scope reduced because terrain-prep already did Nexostrat-native CLAUDE.md/GEMINI.md rewrite — 01c just adds canonical shared-stanza pattern on top, doesn't re-derive from scratch. ~3-4 hours total writing time.

tasks.subject: JP coordination items requested 2026-05-14 — awaiting reply
tasks.notes: Single Signal message sent to JP 2026-05-14 requesting: (1) age pubkey [t-jp-age-keypair sub-item], (2) OS choice (Linux Mint recommended) [t-jp-os-confirmation sub-item], (3) Telegram chat_id, (4) Gitea username preference, (5) invite Ricardo to JP's existing Notion workspace, (6) GitHub username decision. JP has 10h/wk bandwidth — expect drip-feed replies over next few days. Per-item handling: (1)+(5) gating for Plan 01a encryption + Notion ops; (2) gating for Plan 02 OS bootstrap design; (3)+(4)+(6) gating for Plan 04+ telegram/git work. Update this task as items arrive.

tasks.notes: Per CRITICAL 2 fix. Subset of t-jp-coordination-2026-05-14. Message sent 2026-05-14 with full age-keygen recipe (install + generate + extract pubkey FIRST + encrypt with passphrase + shred + verify). JP sends pubkey via Signal. Ricardo adds to infra/age-recipients.txt BEFORE any encryption happens in Plan 01a. ~10 min JP time + coordination latency.

tasks.subject: JP machine OS confirmation — awaiting Signal reply
tasks.notes: Per F13 decision. Subset of t-jp-coordination-2026-05-14. Ricardo recommending Linux Mint. If JP can/will install Mint, no macOS bootstrap work needed. If not, macOS exception path designed in Plan 02. F13 landed in spec §5 commit dc5cbec — jp-heavy.yaml `os: linux-mint`.

tasks.subject: Verify Gitea bare-repo on-disk path for systemd path-watcher (Plan 01b)
tasks.notes: Replaces t-gitea-n8n-paths (n8n verification dropped per 'drop n8n entirely' directive — n8n references fully stripped from spec in Batch 1 commit dc5cbec). Gitea container data is bind-mounted at /srv/gitea/data/git/repositories/nexostrat/nexostrat.git per docker inspect (verified during terrain prep). Plan 01b's systemd path-watcher unit (per C4 fix) watches refs/heads/main inside that path. Cross-check this is correct at Plan 01b execution time and document in 00_GOVERNANCE/system_map.md.

If YELLOW with <=3 amendments, apply inline and proceed. Execute via superpowers:subagent-driven-development. Tag v0.1a-foundation on completion. Also gated on t-jp-age-keypair. Several Plan 01a deliverables already done in terrain prep (.gitignore start, .gitattributes, age key, infra/age-recipients.txt, origin remote) — these become VERIFY tasks instead of CREATE. Per-plan header landed in 00_META/plans/README.md commit d5ebbf9.

tasks.subject: Future amendment cycle — update spec §5 cost table to actual cost-sharing
tasks.notes: Spec §5 carries 'Anthropic API $20-60' to Ricardo. Reality surfaced during Aurora HTML v2 build: both founders pay Claude MAX at $200/mo each from personal subscriptions; Gemini free until ~Oct 2026; Notion + email + hosting + domain JP-personal; Drive + hardware Ricardo-personal. Firm-as-entity pays $0 Stage 1. The presentation (v2 Card 28) reflects reality; the spec doesn't yet. Future amendment cycle should update §5 and add an ADR if needed. Not urgent — the presentation is the JP-facing surface; spec is internal reference and the discrepancy is captured in this task + the 2026-05-14_aurora-html-presentation.md journal.
